phrases.intent_en: The colours of the facades are incredible!
phrases.text_local: Les couleurs des façades sont incroyables !
phrases.pronunciation: lay koo-LUR day fah-SAHD son an-krwah-YAH-bluh
phrases.cultural_note: Menton's old town is famous for its pastel-coloured buildings — ochre, coral, yellow and terracotta. Italians call this style Ligurian baroque.

phrases.intent_en: Can I walk around the narrow streets?
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que je peux me promener dans les ruelles ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kuh zhuh puh muh proh-muh-NAY don lay roo-EL
phrases.cultural_note: The old town is entirely pedestrianised and free to explore. The steep lanes (ruelles) lead up to the basilica and offer sea views.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Old Castle Cemetery?
phrases.text_local: Où est le cimetière du Vieux Château ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh luh seem-TYAIR dew vyuh sha-TOH
phrases.cultural_note: The cemetery at the top of the old town has extraordinary panoramic views and is the burial site of many European aristocrats who came to Menton for the climate.

responses.english: It is located right behind the old church, about three hundred meters from here.
responses.phonetic: OO el suh seem-TYAYR dyoo VYUH sha-TOH
responses.french: Il se trouve juste derrière la vieille église, à environ trois cents mètres d'ici.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the market in the old town is held
phrases.text_local: Où se tient le marché dans la vieille ville ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TYAN luh mar-SHAY dahn lah VYAY veel
phrases.cultural_note: Menton's old town market is held daily on the waterfront below the old town, near the Sablettes beach.

responses.english: At the covered market on Quai de Monléon.
responses.phonetic: soor luh mar-SHAY koo-VAIR doo KAY duh mon-lay-ON.
responses.french: Sur le marché couvert du quai de Monléon.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach the old town from the station
phrases.text_local: Comment monter à la vieille ville depuis la gare ?
phrases.pronunciation: koh-MAHN mon-TAY ah lah VYAY veel duh-PWEE lah gar

responses.english: On foot in ten minutes, climb via Rue Saint-Michel.
responses.phonetic: ah PYAY ahn DEE mee-NOOT, mon-TAY par lah ROO SAN-mee-SHELL.
responses.french: À pied en dix minutes, montez par la rue Saint-Michel.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the Basilica is visible from here

responses.english: Yes, the yellow and ochre bell tower is visible from everywhere.
responses.phonetic: wee, luh kloh-SHAY zhon ay OK-ruh ay vee-ZEEBL duh par-TOO.
responses.french: Oui, le clocher jaune et ocre est visible de partout.
